summary: Tested 4 new features: GlobalSearchBar (desktop sidebar + mobile TopNav), Trending Hashtags tab in Explore, and Notification Preferences enhancements (sound/vibration/digest mode). All backend APIs working (14/14 tests passed). All frontend components verified via Playwright.

fixed_during_testing.issue: notification_preferences.py missing new fields (sound_enabled, vibration_enabled, digest_enabled, digest_frequency)
fixed_during_testing.fix: Added new fields to NotificationPreferencesUpdate model and GET response

fixed_during_testing.issue: Database missing new columns for notification preferences
fixed_during_testing.fix: Added columns via ALTER TABLE: sound_enabled, vibration_enabled, digest_enabled, digest_frequency

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features are working: 1) GlobalSearchBar in desktop sidebar (below Map) with search dropdown showing PEOPLE/SPOTS sections, 2) Mobile TopNav search icon (far left) navigates to /search page, 3) Explore page has Trending tab with Hash icon showing trending hashtags, 4) Settings notification section has Sound & Haptics (sound_enabled, vibration_enabled) and Digest Mode (digest_enabled, digest_frequency with Hourly/Daily/Weekly buttons). Backend APIs: /api/search/global, /api/hashtags/trending, /api/hashtags/{tag}/posts, /api/notifications/preferences/{user_id} all working.

GlobalSearchBar_Desktop.location: Desktop sidebar below Map nav item
GlobalSearchBar_Desktop.functionality: Searches users, spots, posts with dropdown results

GlobalSearchBar_Mobile.functionality: Navigates to /search page with mobile search experience

Trending_Hashtags_Tab.functionality: Shows trending hashtags with Hash icon, empty state when no hashtags

Notification_Preferences.functionality: Sound & Haptics toggles, Digest Mode with frequency selector (Hourly/Daily/Weekly)

backend_apis_tested./api/search/global: PASS - Returns users, spots, posts, hashtags
backend_apis_tested./api/hashtags/trending: PASS - Returns trending hashtags with period_days
backend_apis_tested./api/hashtags/{tag}/posts: PASS - Returns posts for specific hashtag
backend_apis_tested./api/notifications/preferences/{user_id}: PASS - GET/PUT with sound_enabled, vibration_enabled, digest_enabled, digest_frequency
